# Dyota Engineered Solutions

> Dyota Engineered Solutions (Dyota ES) is a Dubai-based provider of Electrical Engineering Services UAE and Power Quality Solutions UAE, counted among Electrical Engineering companies in UAE with 20+ years of experience.

Dyota ES is an Active Harmonic Filter Manufacturer UAE, Capacitor Bank Manufacturer UAE, Harmonic Filter Supplier UAE, and Capacitor bank supplier in UAE — also delivering ETAP Simulation Services UAE, Relay Coordination Study UAE, Electrical Audit UAE, Energy Audit UAE, Busduct Testing UAE, Thermal Imaging Inspection UAE, Earth Leakage Audit UAE, Power Factor Correction UAE, Electrical Consultancy UAE, Arc Flash Study UAE, Reactive Power Compensation UAE, Chiller plant manager supplier UAE solutions, and DEWA Approval consultancy in UAE. Tagline: Designing Today, Powering Tomorrow.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://www.dyotaes.com/): Electrical Engineering Services UAE and Power Quality Solutions UAE overview.
- [About Us](https://www.dyotaes.com/about): Electrical Engineering companies in UAE — vision, mission, values, and expertise.
- [Solutions](https://www.dyotaes.com/solutions): Active Harmonic Filter UAE, best capacitor banks UAE, Power Factor Correction UAE, Chiller plant manager supplier UAE.
- [Services](https://www.dyotaes.com/services): ETAP Simulation Services UAE, audits, studies, testing, and DEWA Approval consultancy in UAE.
- [Contact](https://www.dyotaes.com/contact): Dubai, UAE — phone, email, and inquiry form.

- [Active Harmonic Filter UAE](https://www.dyotaes.com/solutions#harmonic-filters): Active Harmonic Filter Manufacturer UAE and Active harmonic filter UAE suppliers.

- [Chiller Plant Manager UAE](https://www.dyotaes.com/solutions#chiller-cpm): Chiller plant manager supplier UAE systems.

## Services

- [Electrical Engineering & Consultancy](https://www.dyotaes.com/services#engineering-consultancy): Electrical Engineering Services UAE, Electrical Consultancy UAE, DEWA Approval consultancy in UAE.
- [Power Quality, ETAP & Protection Studies](https://www.dyotaes.com/services#power-quality-studies): ETAP Simulation Services UAE, Relay Coordination Study UAE, Arc Flash Study UAE, Earth Leakage Audit UAE.
- [Audits & Inspection](https://www.dyotaes.com/services#audits-inspection): Electrical Audit UAE, Energy Audit UAE, Busduct Testing UAE, Thermal Imaging Inspection UAE, energy audit companies in UAE.
- [Network Testing](https://www.dyotaes.com/services#network-testing): Capacitor bank testing, earth testing, switchgear and LV diagnostics.
